description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a smooth, dark metallic finish. The stock and fore-end are crafted from wood, displaying a rich brown color and a slightly textured grain pattern. The receiver and barrel are made of metal, with the receiver connecting the wooden stock to the barrel seamlessly. The fore-end, located beneath the barrel, is ribbed for grip and is used to operate the pump-action mechanism. The trigger guard is rounded and encloses a single trigger, providing protection and ease of access. The overall design is utilitarian, with a focus on durability and functionality, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as law enforcement or civilian defense.
description: A pump-action shotgun with a long, dark metal barrel and brown wooden stock and fore-end, featuring a ribbed pump grip and rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, ribbed fore-end, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the wooden stock and fore-end.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and fore-end.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
